Global time zone data management and IANA timezone data update script.


## Files
- **[timezones_olson.txt](timezones_olson.txt.md)**: Manages global time zone data, including definitions, DST rules, historical changes, and regional variations.
- **[update_timezones.py](update_timezones.py.md)**: Downloads and extracts the latest timezone data from IANA, then compiles it into a text file.
